INST888 Doctoral Seminar (3 Credits)

Advanced seminar on selected topics in information studies. Restriction: Must be in Information Studies (Doctoral) program; and permission of INFO-College of Information Studies.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. INST888 or LBSC888.
